UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user preferences and settings for the document generator.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user (Firebase Auth UID).

useCustomApiKey.description: Whether the user prefers to use their own Gemini API key.

userApiKey.description: The user's custom Gemini API key (should be handled securely).

updatedAt.description: When the profile was last updated.
